steps.title: Set Up the Unit Conversion
steps.content: To convert from yards to miles, we divide the distance in yards by the number of yards per mile. We have 5,456 yards and need to divide by the given conversion factor of 1,760 yards/mile.
steps.formula: $$\text{distance in miles} = \frac{\text{distance in yards}}{\text{yards per mile}}$$

steps.title: Calculate the Distance in Miles
steps.content:
Perform the division:
$$\frac{5456}{1760} = 3.1$$
That confirms B is correct.
